summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Skill Circuit edtech platform MVP. All core features are working correctly including public pages, course management, admin functionality, and authentication.
passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section, USPs, and journey steps
Navigation works - Home, About, Courses, Contact links functional
Courses page loads with category tabs (All, Neo, Sprint, Pathway, Launchpad)
Category tab filtering works correctly for all categories
Course cards display properly (9 courses found as expected)
Course detail page loads when clicking course cards
Login page loads with email/password form and Google login button
Contact form submission works with all required fields
Admin login works with admin@skillcircuit.com / admin123
Admin dashboard shows overview with analytics (users, courses, enrollments, revenue)
Admin can access all management tabs (overview, courses, students, CMS)
All 19 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Database seeding functional with 9 courses and admin user
Course categories properly distributed (3 Neo, 2 Sprint, 2 Pathway, 2 Launchpad)
Responsive design working on desktop viewport
All CRUD operations functional for admin users
